publicTasks: Make the food for the event.

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: He acts tough but wants people to like him.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Feeling genuinely appreciated for his cooking or being publicly embarrassed about it.

goals.mayorGoalForThem: Make good food for the party.

notes: He is not well-liked for being old and mean.
Historian (Peta) likes him because they are both older / work-buddy energy.

secrets.mildSecret: He has a secret cookbook with his recipes.
secrets.spicySafeSecret: He has a secret ingredient that makes everyone he doesn’t like throw up.

rumorBehavior.notes: Doesn’t talk much, but if pushed he will share.
